text: DynamoDB Considerations @ osismamania. © s * NoSQL ... preference DynamoDB in the exam * Relational Data ... generally NOT DynamoDB * Key/Value.. preference DynamoDB in the exam * Access via console, CLI, APl ..'NO SQL’ A dedicated lesson on PartiQL (SQL like language) is coming up later - true SQL is not supported
